title: still_alive.jar (Horror)
description: Adds a visitor to your world. An anonymous visitor...
body:
This horror mod adds... anonymous entities to your game. Look around and find out.

_Info:_

This horror mod also adds another dimension, which you can temporarily get to by either sleeping, which you can only get a glance of it like that, or getting the null item and right click to explore it for a specific amount of time before getting sent back.

You will find strange structures around your world.

You will find entities that are not pleasant for you to be here.

Find the rest out yourself by playing.

**OFFICIAL DISCORD: https://discord.gg/uj6xaFMvE5**
